subject: docs(todo): replace generic CLAUDE.md steps with per-repo researched findings
body:
Researched all 10 downstream repos via GitHub API to determine actual state
of each repo's CLAUDE.md and local pattern files. Replaced generic copy-paste
steps with specific, actionable items based on what each repo actually has:

- repo-tor: Already aligned (Pass) — no action needed
- budgy-ting: Partial — has clean pointer but stale URLs to CLAUDE.md
- canva-grid: Stale refs to "Suggested Implementations" in two places
- model-pear: Stale AI Note pointing to glow-props CLAUDE.md
- see-veo: ~280 lines hardcoded inline patterns to delete
- few-lap: ~620 lines hardcoded inline patterns to delete
- sun-sea-o: ~470 lines hardcoded inline patterns + stale Shared References
- graphiki: ~180 lines hardcoded inline patterns to delete
- four-ems: ~475 lines hardcoded inline patterns to delete
- synctone: Only repo with local docs/implementations/ folder (8 files)

Updated gap matrix: repo-tor=Pass, budgy-ting=Partial.
Updated cross-cutting gaps with researched severity breakdown.

Tags: documentation, cross-repo, patterns, audit
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-library
Semver: minor
